producer.origin: elara-mesh maintainer receipts feed — act 019f4ebd-66f0-7651-9d21-107e1d3afabc; assembled from /record/{id}/wire: the signed act record + an epoch seal current at snapshot time (on today's single-zone mesh that is the zone-0 seal; per-act zone resolution lands with multi-zone).
